problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Metal-organic. Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry directly addresses this.
